_doc: Regression baseline for the repaint evals. Gate on the DELTA vs this baseline, not the absolute number. See evals/README.md for the six gate rules. This is a sibling artifact to evals.json (the canonical assertions-as-strings eval set) — never merge it into evals.json.
method: Assertion-level pass-rate (passed assertions / total assertions) per run, averaged across 3 runs. Per-eval entries are the median passed-count across the 3 runs.
tool_stall_note: A lone 0/N on an inspect/fixture eval (observed: eval-4 = 0/6 in one of three runs) is a single-shot / tool-less harness artifact, NOT a skill regression. Judge per-eval health by majority across runs, never a single run.
